speaker: speaker1
text: Hey Sandra , what's wrong ? You look furious !

speaker: speaker2
text: I've had it with Tim ! I think I'm going to quit !

speaker: speaker1
text: But Sandra ... you love your job ! You spent months trying to get this position . It's perfect for you !

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah ... I know . But I'm sick and tired of all the office power struggles !

speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of power struggles are you talking about ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Basically , I think Tim is threatened by me . I'm doing a better job than he is so he's trying to sabotage my career !

speaker: speaker1
text: So he talks about you behind your back ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . He's all nice and friendly to my face . But the second I turn around he stabs me in the back !

speaker: speaker1
text: I had a worker like that once . She was always taking credit for my ideas .

speaker: speaker2
text: I should keep a better record of my correspondence with the clients so if necessary I can prove it was my effort .

speaker: speaker1
text: My co-worker had a whole bunch of bad office habits . She liked to name-drop ... we would be in a meeting and she would say , yesterday I was chatting with Tom . She meant Tom Solomon ... our CEO .
